scripts.dev: doppler run -- doppler run --mount .dev.vars --format env -- bun wrangler dev src/index.ts --remote=false --port=9999 --env=dev --test-scheduled
scripts.prd:pulumi:preview: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi preview --cwd src/infra --stack loshmi-control-panel/prd
scripts.prd:pulumi:refresh: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi refresh --cwd src/infra --stack loshmi-control-panel/prd
scripts.prd:pulumi:up: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi up --cwd src/infra --stack loshmi-control-panel/prd
scripts.prd:pulumi:stack-output: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi stack output --json --cwd src/infra --stack loshmi-control-panel/prd
scripts.prd:once:set-d1-database-ids: doppler run -c prd -- bun run src/infra/tasks/set-d1-database-ids.ts
